content.text:
All 188 tests pass, typecheck clean, lint clean. Verification:

- `test -f src/components/llm/RetryAffordance.tsx` → exists
- `grep navigator.clipboard.writeText src/components/llm/Message.tsx` → line 76
- `grep 'jump to bottom' src/components/llm/ChatMessageList.tsx` → 3 matches

Implemented:
- B1 ChatHeader: "clear" button (ghost, sm) with `window.confirm("clear this conversation? cannot be undone.")` → `useChat.clear()`
- B2 Message: `CopyButton` (ghost, sm) on assistant messages, strips markdown + `[cN]` markers, writes via `navigator.clipboard.writeText`, shows "copied" for 1.5s
- B3 RetryAffordance: new component using Surface (mute, border, padding=4) + Cluster (gap=3) with red error span + outline retry button; rendered in ChatMessageList for the last assistant message when `status === "error"`
- B4 ChatMessageList: tracks anchored state via `scroll` listener with 60px threshold, smooth autoscroll via `useLayoutEffect` on token deltas, floating "↓ jump to bottom" button when not anchored
- B5 ChatInput: when `isStreaming`, submit button becomes ghost "stop" and calls `onStop` (wired to `useChat.stopStreaming`)
- ChatSurface wired to `useChat` so all controls are functional

IMPL_RESULT: PASS

result:
All 188 tests pass, typecheck clean, lint clean. Verification:

- `test -f src/components/llm/RetryAffordance.tsx` → exists
- `grep navigator.clipboard.writeText src/components/llm/Message.tsx` → line 76
- `grep 'jump to bottom' src/components/llm/ChatMessageList.tsx` → 3 matches

Implemented:
- B1 ChatHeader: "clear" button (ghost, sm) with `window.confirm("clear this conversation? cannot be undone.")` → `useChat.clear()`
- B2 Message: `CopyButton` (ghost, sm) on assistant messages, strips markdown + `[cN]` markers, writes via `navigator.clipboard.writeText`, shows "copied" for 1.5s
- B3 RetryAffordance: new component using Surface (mute, border, padding=4) + Cluster (gap=3) with red error span + outline retry button; rendered in ChatMessageList for the last assistant message when `status === "error"`
- B4 ChatMessageList: tracks anchored state via `scroll` listener with 60px threshold, smooth autoscroll via `useLayoutEffect` on token deltas, floating "↓ jump to bottom" button when not anchored
- B5 ChatInput: when `isStreaming`, submit button becomes ghost "stop" and calls `onStop` (wired to `useChat.stopStreaming`)
- ChatSurface wired to `useChat` so all controls are functional

IMPL_RESULT: PASS
